page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 64 virtual CPUs and 32 physical Intel cores operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system allocates dedicated CPU resources with two threads per core and provides 256.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering high-speed local data access directly on the host. For network connectivity, the m8idn.16xlarge delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. It is optimized for both network throughput and Elastic Block Store (EBS) performance, though it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m8idn.16xlarge balances high-density compute resources, substantial local NVMe storage, and high-speed networking within a single general-purpose profile. This configuration is suitable for workloads requiring a balance of memory and compute alongside fast local storage, such as relational databases, distributed data stores, enterprise applications, and caching layers.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.16xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance built on the Nitro hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs, 32 physical Intel cores running at 3.9 GHz, and 256.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. Designed for network and EBS optimization, this server delivers balanced compute and memory resources alongside high-speed local storage. It is well-suited for workloads such as relational databases, enterprise applications, caching layers, and distributed data stores.

tagline: A high-bandwidth general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, substantial local NVMe SSD storage, and 100 Gbps baseline networking.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical Intel cores running at 3.9 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
3800 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with EBS optimization
Suited for relational databases, enterprise applications, and caching layers
